title: Faction Kill Bond Earnings
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS total FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT AwardingFaction AS label, COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS value FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY AwardingFaction ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Cr earned in conflict zone kill bonds during the report period.
details.help: FactionKillBond.Reward per kill; AwardingFaction identifies which side of the conflict paid the bond. total drives the title.

tagLines: Conflict zone combat bond disbursements processed. The relevant factions express their appreciation.
You chose a side. Multiple times. The credits confirm it.
Kill bonds are the price factions pay for soldiers willing to bleed in their conflict zones.
